feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Anti-amyloid nanobody-Fc fusion protein drives potent amyloid clearance through microglial recruitment.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白纳米抗体-Fc融合蛋白通过招募小胶质细胞高效清除脑内淀粉样斑块。

drug.title: Statistical inference for saved time based on disease progression curves in Alzheimer's disease research.
drug.zh: 提出基于疾病进展曲线上方区域计算节省时间的闭式方差，解决了统计推断难题。

drug.title: Comparative risk of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities with anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibodies: A systematic review and penalized likelihood network meta-analysis of randomized trials.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病时，ARIA-E和ARIA-H风险因药物和APOE4基因型而异。

drug.title: Suboptimal adherence to brain health recommendations in patients pursuing anti-amyloid antibody therapy for Alzheimer's disease: Report from the Brain Health Vital Signs project.
drug.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
drug.zh: 接受抗淀粉样蛋白治疗的早期阿尔茨海默病患者对脑健康建议的依从性普遍不足。

drug.title: UPLC-ESI-qTOF-MS metabolomic characterization and in vivo neuroprotective activity of Diplotaxis harra ethanolic extract through antioxidant, anti-cholinesterase, and anti-amyloid mechanisms.
drug.zh: Diplotaxis harra乙醇提取物通过抗氧化、抗胆碱酯酶和抗淀粉样蛋白机制，在AlCl₃诱导的阿尔茨海默病大鼠模型中改善空间记忆并恢复海马生化指标。

drug.title: Efficacy, safety and policy implications of anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's disease: protocol for a living systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病的疗效与安全性需通过持续更新的系统评价来动态评估。

drug.title: Optimal control for anti-abeta treatment in Alzheimer's disease using a reaction-diffusion model.
drug.journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface
drug.zh: 基于反应-扩散模型的最优控制策略，可个性化优化抗Aβ治疗剂量以平衡疗效与ARIA风险。

drug.title: Microglial checkpoint collapse in Alzheimer's disease: a tri-axial framework for biomarker-informed neuroimmune therapy.
drug.zh: 小胶质细胞检查点崩溃是AD神经免疫治疗新靶点，提出三轴框架指导生物标志物分层。

mech.title: Repurposing trazodone for Alzheimer's disease to modulate soluble ST2 levels and alleviate Alzheimer's pathology.
mech.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of S
mech.zh: 曲唑酮通过降低可溶性ST2水平改善小胶质细胞Aβ清除功能，缓解阿尔茨海默病理。

mech.title: 3D nanoscale imaging of amyloid-β oligomer interactions with extracellular vesicles by cryo-ET.
mech.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of S
mech.zh: 冷冻电镜三维成像首次揭示Aβ寡聚体以插入和覆盖方式结合细胞外囊泡脂膜。

mech.title: Molecular Regulation of Pyroptosis in Alzheimer's Disease: Linking Neuroinflammation, Cell Death, and Therapeutic Targeting.
mech.zh: 焦亡通过gasdermin蛋白介导神经炎症与血脑屏障破坏，成为阿尔茨海默病的关键病理机制及治疗靶点。

mech.title: Protein kinases as therapeutic targets in Alzheimer's disease: challenges, insights, and new frontiers.
mech.zh: 蛋白激酶靶向治疗阿尔茨海默病面临挑战，但为突破淀粉样蛋白假说提供了新方向。

mech.title: A First-In-Class Antibody Enabling Detection of Altered Peripheral Non-Phosphorylated Clusterin With Translational Potential in Dementia.
mech.zh: 一种新型抗体可特异性检测痴呆患者血液中脑源性非磷酸化簇集蛋白，有望成为客观诊断阿尔茨海默病的生物标志物。

mech.title: Young Adult Microglial Deletion of C1q Reduces Engulfment of Synapses and Partially Mitigates Cognitive Impairment in an Aggressive Alzheimer's Disease Mouse Model.
mech.zh: 成年小鼠小胶质细胞特异性敲除C1q减少突触吞噬并部分改善阿尔茨海默病认知障碍。

mech.title: Vascular-Apoptotic Crosstalk in Alzheimer's Disease: The Possible Role of Vascular Senescence in Blood-Brain Barrier Dysfunction.
mech.zh: AD患者血脑屏障损伤与血管衰老相关，ET-1通过p53通路介导凋亡与屏障功能紊乱。

mech.title: Breaking the glial loop: astrocytic PAD2 and citrullinated vimentin drive microglial dysfunction in Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: 星形胶质细胞PAD2瓜氨酸化波形蛋白经TLR4驱动小胶质细胞促炎环路，致淀粉样蛋白清除障碍。

dx.title: Glial molecular signatures as a liquid biopsy marker in Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
dx.zh: 胶质细胞分子特征可作为阿尔茨海默病液体活检新标志物，优于传统蛋白指标。

dx.title: Performance of Alzheimer Disease Plasma Biomarkers in Patients With Prion Diseases.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217等AD生物标志物在朊病毒病中显著升高，无法可靠区分阿尔茨海默病与朊病毒病。

dx.title: Amyloid PET Quantitation and Centiloid Thresholds in the Diagnosis of Alzheimer Disease: An Individual Participant Data Meta-Analysis.
dx.zh: 基于个体数据荟萃分析，确定了基于视觉读片和数据驱动方法的淀粉样蛋白PET Centiloid阳性阈值。

dx.title: Plasma Phosphorylated Tau 217 in Participants at Risk for Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在慢性创伤性脑病风险人群中主要反映β-淀粉样蛋白病理，而非CTE特异性tau蛋白病变。

dx.title: A probabilistic framework for clinicopathological Alzheimer's disease using tau-PET.
dx.zh: 基于tau-PET的量化框架可评估阿尔茨海默病临床病理概率，并受年龄和淀粉样蛋白状态调节。

dx.title: Analytical and clinical validation of a novel proximity extension assay-based plasma biomarker panel in a cohort of prevalent neurodegenerative dementias.
dx.zh: 基于PEA技术的Olink 48-plex血浆蛋白组合在多种痴呆鉴别中展现出良好的分析性能与临床验证价值。

dx.title: Relative importance of blood-based biomarkers for Alzheimer's disease-specific neurodegeneration and cognitive decline.
dx.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在阿尔茨海默病特异性神经退行及认知下降中的相对重要性最高。

dx.title: Application of plasma phosphorylated tau 217 in a memory clinic focusing on Chinese patients.
dx.zh: 血浆P-tau217在中国记忆门诊人群中验证了诊断阿尔茨海默病的本地化阈值，提升了真实世界诊断准确性。

prev.title: Real-Time Associations Between Subjective Cognitive Concerns and Daily Activity Participation in Persons Aging With Stroke: Smartphone-Based Ecological Momentary Assessment Study.
prev.zh: 智能手机生态瞬时评估揭示，脑卒中后老年人主观认知担忧与日常活动参与度呈实时负相关。

prev.title: [Incidence of the progression and remission of cognitive decline in older adults].
prev.journal: Revista medica del Instituto Mexicano de
prev.zh: 墨西哥老年人认知功能进展与缓解的两年纵向研究揭示社会不平等与痴呆风险相关。

prev.title: Algorithmic Choreography: Redefining Human and Non-Human Relations in Digital Health.
prev.zh: 阿尔茨海默病护理中，算法与人类通过“共舞”而非单向控制重塑数字健康关系。

prev.title: Knowledge of inorganic nitrate dietary survey-2 (KINDS-2): a multinational cross-sectional study of nitrate knowledge, beliefs and purchasing behaviours in the general population and healthcare professionals.
prev.journal: International journal of food sciences a
prev.zh: KINDS-2跨国调查揭示：普通人群和医疗专业人员对膳食硝酸盐的心血管益处认知普遍较低。

prev.title: Mechanisms Linking Low Health Literacy to Homebound Incidence: A Mediation Analysis Through the Development of Chronic Conditions.
prev.zh: 低健康素养通过诱发慢性病（如痴呆、心衰）间接增加老年人居家不出风险。

prev.title: Comparative risk of early-onset dementia with lithium versus valproate in bipolar disorder: A real-world cohort study.
prev.zh: 锂盐相比丙戊酸盐可显著降低双相障碍患者早发性痴呆风险。

prev.title: Sleep-Related Alzheimer's Disease Vulnerability in Aging: A Muscle-Metabolic Perspective.
prev.zh: 衰老中肌少症与胰岛素抵抗通过破坏睡眠连续性增加阿尔茨海默病风险。

prev.title: Helicobacter pylori, herpes simplex virus-1, varicella-zoster virus, and dementia risk.
prev.zh: 24年随访证实幽门螺杆菌感染使痴呆风险增加24%，而HSV-1和VZV无显著关联。

intro.title: Metabolic reprogramming in Alzheimer's disease: Interaction between receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, noncoding RNAs, and Neuron-Glia energy networks.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑能量供应出问题会导致阿尔茨海默病，看懂它有助于普通人理解预防该病要从保护脑细胞能量代谢入手。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨头变脆和脑子变糊涂可能通过免疫系统相互影响，帮普通人理解为什么预防骨质疏松也可能保护记忆力。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是，大脑细胞里的能量工厂“线粒体”坏了会加速老年痴呆，看懂它有助于普通人从保护细胞能量入手预防或延缓病情。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“化学信使”的小分子，在老年痴呆早期保护大脑、晚期却搞破坏，还受性别和感染影响，帮普通人理解为啥男女风险不同。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的“垃圾回收站”坏了会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个回收站。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的清洁工（小胶质细胞）如何影响阿尔茨海默病，以及未来可能通过调节它们来开发更安全的新药。

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在老年痴呆中如何受损，帮普通人理解未来可能通过修复这层膜来早期预防或治疗。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白质和老年痴呆的关系，帮普通人了解目前哪些结论靠谱、哪些还不确定，以及未来可能怎么治病。
